subcodes.first_line: O Qasim! The Lord of all mankind maketh mention of thee in His days and beareth thee glad-tidings of this Revelation wherein He Who converseth doth speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قاسم یذکرک مولی الانام فی ایامه و یبشرک بهذا الظهور الذی فیه ینطق مکلم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
